craigslist.title: Easy highway access
craigslist.full_address: 00PM Harlo Apartments 31499 Mound Road, Warren, MI
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post This is a 2 Bedroom, 1 Bath, Approximately 1000 Sq. Ft. Visit This Website to See More: https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/qv4wbr Call Now - show contact info x 34 OR Text 34 to show contact info to contact our leasing team. Experience Harlo Apartments Community Info: Step inside our one- or two-bedroom open-concept floor plan apartments and experience the peace and tranquility of Harlo. You'll be greeted by large windows that let the natural sunlight in, and all the amenities of modern living; individually controlled AC and heat, plush carpet, generous closet space and an updated, ready-to-entertain kitchen, complete with oak cabinets and gas stove. If that weren't enough, your new home comes complete with beautiful views of a lush courtyard, access to a private swimming pool with an open sun deck and reclining lounge chairs, and updated fitness center with flat screen TV. Nestled in a beautiful neighborhood, Harlo Apartments in Macomb County has exactly what you're looking for in your new home. Features: ‣  Red brick buildings and traditional architecture ‣  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 800 to 1,000 square feet ‣  Controlled access buildings ‣  Large picture windows allow floods of natural sunlight ‣  Spacious living room, dining room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ‣  Dishwasher available in select homes ‣  Updated lighting fixtures throughout ‣  Well-designed kitchen featuring maple cabinetry and gas stove Community Amenities: ‣  Pet friendly community ‣  Common laundry room with full size washer and dryer ‣  Professional onsite management team ‣  Flex rental payments ‣  Resort-style swimming pool with expansive sun deck ‣  Open parking and carports ‣  On-site resident storage ‣  Beautiful, lush grounds and courtyards with mature landscaping ‣  Updater application ‣  BILT payment center ‣  Professionally-equipped exercise room with flat screen televisions ‣  Easy highway access ‣  Online resident portal ‣  Near shopping, dining and entertainment venues ‣  Package receiving Pet Policy: We are very happy to welcome your cats and small dogs as members of our community at Harlo Apartments. Just down the street you'll find wonderful dog parks and walking trails, or stay close to home and enjoy the lush landscape, mature trees and tranquil open spaces. If you'd like to schedule a tour, be sure to bring your best friend along so they can explore Harlo Apartments with you. Income Requirements: Recent 30 days of pay stubs to meet 2.5 times the rent Office Hours: Monday-Friday: 9:00AM-5:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-5:00PM Harlo Apartments 31499 Mound Road, Warren, MI, 48092 Equal Housing Opportunity 7cIao29Kn

Located in one of the best managed Hickory Woods condo complex in Belleville -- Unit offers a private deck overlooking a courtyard and great views of the pond. Open Elegant Floor Plan includes two large size bedrooms with upgraded shared bathroom on upper level with Jacuzzi tub and two sinks. Kitchen has stainless steel appliances and also offers separate dining area with door wall to deck overlooking pond. In-Unit laundry offers Washer and Dryer. Condo is equipped with Central Air. The unit also includes a full basement and attached garage. Easy access to I-94 and I-275, and proximity to many great restaurants, and department stores like Meijers, Walmart, Target, etc. Landlord pays association dues and water. Renter pays monthly lease, gas and electric. Minimum two year lease, no pets, no smoking in unit and Decent Credit required. craigslist.title: Easy access to I-75 and I-696, Package receiving, Covered parking
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Lexington Village Apartments 32000 Concord Drive, Madison Heights, MI, 48071 Call Now - show contact info x 179 OR Text 179 to show contact info to contact our team. Follow The Link Below: https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/0iy5se APARTMENTS IN MADISON HEIGHTS 1 bedroom | 1 bath | 625 square feet Features ✓  Gas range in all apartment homes ✓  Beautiful courtyard views available ✓  Spacious closets ✓  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ✓  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ✓  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 625 to 850 square feet ✓  Dishwashers available in select homes ✓  On-site resident storage included ✓  Heated hallways ✓  Common laundry room in each building with full size washer and dryer ✓  Individually-controlled air conditioning units ✓  Gas/heat, water, and trash included in flat monthly rate ✓  Indoor mailboxes ✓  Walk-in closets in select homes ✓  Large picturesque windows fitted with designer selected blinds ✓  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet Community Features ✓  Flex rental payments ✓  Updater application ✓  Online resident portal ✓  24-hour maintenance response guarantee ✓  Covered parking ✓  On-site resident storage ✓  Pet friendly community with well-designed pet area and less than a mile away from city dog park ✓  Controlled access and intercom system for building entry ✓  Beautiful, mature landscape ✓  Walking distance to AMC Theater and Oakland Mall ✓  BILT payment center ✓  Easy access to I-75 and I-696 ✓  Expansive community clubhouse ✓  Professional onsite management team ✓  Community laundry facility with industrial sized machines ✓  State-of-the-art fitness center with flat screen televisions ✓  Package receiving Community Info Welcome home. Open floor plans and natural light is what you'll find when you choose a new home at Lexington Village. Whether you decide on a one- or two- bedroom concept, you'll be greeted by a spacious living room that seamlessly flows into an newly upgraded, contemporary kitchen. High-quality appliances, wood-like vinyl flooring, optional dishwasher, and stylish new cabinets are just a few of the amenities available to you. Spacious closets, individual AC and heat controls, on-site laundry and indoor mailboxes make your life convenient and comfortable, while shared community features that include a clubhouse, swimming pool and fitness center make living at Lexington Village an easy choice for your new home. Pet Policy Lexington Village Apartments offers pet friendly apartments in Madison Heights and welcomes both cats and dogs. You'll find beautiful green spaces where your dog can run and play. In addition, your dog can run free and meet new friends at the nearby Red Oak Dog Park. We are one of the few communities in the area to welcome your large dog! We have a limit of 2 pets under 25 lbs each or one large pet without a weight limit. Some breed restrictions apply. We're confident your pet will love living at Lexington Village Apartments as much as our human neighbors do! Office Hours Monday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Tuesday: 9:00AM-7:00PM Wednesday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Thursday: 9:00AM-7:00PM Friday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-6:00PM Sunday: 10:00AM-2:00PM Equal Housing Opportunity IpcW4DPj95

High-quality appliances, wood-like vinyl flooring, optional dishwasher, and stylish new cabinets are just a few of the amenities available to you. Spacious closets, individual AC and heat controls, on-site laundry and indoor mailboxes make your life convenient and comfortable, while shared community features that include a clubhouse, swimming pool and fitness center make living at Lexington Village an easy choice for your new home. Residence Features ✩  Large picturesque windows fitted with designer selected blinds ✩  Gas range in all apartment homes ✩  Walk-in closets in select homes ✩  Gas/heat, water, and trash included in flat monthly rate ✩  On-site resident storage included ✩  Spacious closets ✩  Beautiful courtyard views available ✩  Indoor mailboxes ✩  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ✩  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 625 to 850 square feet ✩  Individually-controlled air conditioning units ✩  Common laundry room in each building with full size washer and dryer ✩  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ✩  Heated hallways ✩  Dishwashers available in select homes ✩  Brick buildings and traditional architecture Community Features ✩  Walking distance to AMC Theater and Oakland Mall ✩  Beautiful, mature landscape ✩  Package receiving ✩  Updater application ✩  Professional onsite management team ✩  Easy access to I-75 and I-696 ✩  Controlled access and intercom system for building entry ✩  State-of-the-art fitness center with flat screen televisions ✩  Pet friendly community with well-designed pet area and less than a mile away from city dog park ✩  Community laundry facility with industrial sized machines ✩  Flex rental payments ✩  BILT payment center ✩  Online resident portal ✩  24-hour maintenance response guarantee ✩  Covered parking ✩  Expansive community clubhouse ✩  On-site resident storage Pet Policy Lexington Village Apartments offers pet friendly apartments in Madison Heights and welcomes both cats and dogs. We are one of the few communities in the area to welcome your large dog! We have a limit of 2 pets under 25 lbs each or one large pet without a weight limit. Some breed restrictions apply. We're confident your pet will love living at Lexington Village Apartments as much as our human neighbors do! Turn left at John R Rd. Pass 13 Mille and you will see Sam's Club on your right. Turn right at the first street after Sam's Club (Irving). Turn left at the next main street, Harlo. President Madison Apartments is in the apartment building 31597 with a blue and white sign in front. From I-75S: Exit at 14 Mile Rd. and turn left. Turn right at John R Rd. Turn left at Whitcomb (7-11 and target). Turn right at the next main street, Harlo. President Madison Apartments is in the apartment building 31597 with a blue and white sign in front. Office Hours Monday-Friday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-6:00PM Pet Policy We are very happy to welcome your cats and small dogs as members of our community at President Madison. Just down the street you'll find wonderful dog parks and walking trails, or stay close to home and enjoy the lush landscape, mature trees, and tranquil open spaces. Experience Harlo Apartments Community Info: Step inside our one- or two-bedroom open-concept floor plan apartments and experience the peace and tranquility of Harlo. You'll be greeted by large windows that let the natural sunlight in, and all the amenities of modern living; individually controlled AC and heat, plush carpet, generous closet space and an updated, ready-to-entertain kitchen, complete with oak cabinets and gas stove. If that weren't enough, your new home comes complete with beautiful views of a lush courtyard, access to a private swimming pool with an open sun deck and reclining lounge chairs, and updated fitness center with flat screen TV. Nestled in a beautiful neighborhood, Harlo Apartments in Macomb County has exactly what you're looking for in your new home. Features: ‣  Spacious living room, dining room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ‣  Red brick buildings and traditional architecture ‣  Dishwasher available in select homes ‣  Large picture windows allow floods of natural sunlight ‣  Controlled access buildings ‣  Updated lighting fixtures throughout ‣  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 800 to 1,000 square feet ‣  Well-designed kitchen featuring maple cabinetry and gas stove Community Amenities: ‣  Package receiving ‣  Updater application ‣  Near shopping, dining and entertainment venues ‣  Open parking and carports ‣  Professional onsite management team ‣  Professionally-equipped exercise room with flat screen televisions ‣  BILT payment center ‣  Flex rental payments ‣  Beautiful, lush grounds and courtyards with mature landscaping ‣  On-site resident storage ‣  Pet friendly community ‣  Resort-style swimming pool with expansive sun deck ‣  Easy highway access ‣  Online resident portal ‣  Common laundry room with full size washer and dryer Pet Policy: We are very happy to welcome your cats and small dogs as members of our community at Harlo Apartments. Just down the street you'll find wonderful dog parks and walking trails, or stay close to home and enjoy the lush landscape, mature trees and tranquil open spaces. If you'd like to schedule a tour, be sure to bring your best friend along so they can explore Harlo Apartments with you. APARTMENTS IN MADISON HEIGHTS Community Info: Welcome home. Open floor plans and natural light is what you'll find when you choose a new home at Lexington Village. Whether you decide on a one- or two- bedroom concept, you'll be greeted by a spacious living room that seamlessly flows into an newly upgraded, contemporary kitchen. High-quality appliances, wood-like vinyl flooring, optional dishwasher, and stylish new cabinets are just a few of the amenities available to you. Spacious closets, individual AC and heat controls, on-site laundry and indoor mailboxes make your life convenient and comfortable, while shared community features that include a clubhouse, swimming pool and fitness center make living at Lexington Village an easy choice for your new home. Features: ‣  Individually-controlled air conditioning units ‣  Heated hallways ‣  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 625 to 850 square feet ‣  Indoor mailboxes ‣  Common laundry room in each building with full size washer and dryer ‣  Large picturesque windows fitted with designer selected blinds ‣  Gas/heat, water, and trash included in flat monthly rate ‣  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ‣  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ‣  On-site resident storage included ‣  Gas range in all apartment homes ‣  Beautiful courtyard views available ‣  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ‣  Dishwashers available in select homes ‣  Spacious closets ‣  Walk-in closets in select homes Community Amenities: ‣  Online resident portal ‣  Expansive community clubhouse ‣  Package receiving ‣  BILT payment center ‣  Walking distance to AMC Theater and Oakland Mall ‣  Covered parking ‣  Pet friendly community with well-designed pet area and less than a mile away from city dog park ‣  On-site resident storage ‣  Community laundry facility with industrial sized machines ‣  Controlled access and intercom system for building entry ‣  Professional onsite management team ‣  Updater application ‣  State-of-the-art fitness center with flat screen televisions ‣  Beautiful, mature landscape ‣  Easy access to I-75 and I-696 ‣  Flex rental payments ‣  24-hour maintenance response guarantee Pet Policy: Lexington Village Apartments offers pet friendly apartments in Madison Heights and welcomes both cats and dogs. We're confident your pet will love living at Lexington Village Apartments as much as our human neighbors do! Walk-in closets give you the room you need, and central AC and heat put you in control of your environment - no matter what the weather is like outside. Our modern community center, gated pool with lounge furniture, and fitness center are conveniently accessible and open when you need to relax, unwind or blow off steam. Located near the best of what Metro Detroit has to offer, President Madison has exactly what you're looking for in your new home. craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Lexington Village Apartments 32000 Concord Drive, Madison Heights, MI, 48071 Call Now - show contact info x 175 OR Text 175 to show contact info to text our leasing team. Want more info on this unit? See the link (below): https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/8xp6ul APARTMENTS IN MADISON HEIGHTS 2 bedroom | 1 bath | 800 square feet Features ✓  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ✓  Heated hallways ✓  Gas/heat, water, and trash included in flat monthly rate ✓  Indoor mailboxes ✓  Large picturesque windows fitted with designer selected blinds ✓  Gas range in all apartment homes ✓  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ✓  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ✓  Common laundry room in each building with full size washer and dryer ✓  Dishwashers available in select homes ✓  On-site resident storage included ✓  Spacious closets ✓  Walk-in closets in select homes ✓  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 625 to 850 square feet ✓  Individually-controlled air conditioning units ✓  Beautiful courtyard views available Community Features ✓  Covered parking ✓  Package receiving ✓  Community laundry facility with industrial sized machines ✓  BILT payment center ✓  Pet friendly community with well-designed pet area and less than a mile away from city dog park ✓  Professional onsite management team ✓  24-hour maintenance response guarantee ✓  Easy access to I-75 and I-696 ✓  Controlled access and intercom system for building entry ✓  State-of-the-art fitness center with flat screen televisions ✓  Flex rental payments ✓  On-site resident storage ✓  Updater application ✓  Expansive community clubhouse ✓  Online resident portal ✓  Beautiful, mature landscape ✓  Walking distance to AMC Theater and Oakland Mall Community Info Welcome home. Open floor plans and natural light is what you'll find when you choose a new home at Lexington Village. Whether you decide on a one- or two- bedroom concept, you'll be greeted by a spacious living room that seamlessly flows into an newly upgraded, contemporary kitchen. High-quality appliances, wood-like vinyl flooring, optional dishwasher, and stylish new cabinets are just a few of the amenities available to you. Spacious closets, individual AC and heat controls, on-site laundry and indoor mailboxes make your life convenient and comfortable, while shared community features that include a clubhouse, swimming pool and fitness center make living at Lexington Village an easy choice for your new home. Pet Policy Lexington Village Apartments offers pet friendly apartments in Madison Heights and welcomes both cats and dogs. You'll find beautiful green spaces where your dog can run and play. In addition, your dog can run free and meet new friends at the nearby Red Oak Dog Park. We are one of the few communities in the area to welcome your large dog! We have a limit of 2 pets under 25 lbs each or one large pet without a weight limit. Some breed restrictions apply. We're confident your pet will love living at Lexington Village Apartments as much as our human neighbors do! craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post This is a 1 Bedroom, 1 Bath, Approximately 820 Sq. Ft. Want more info on this unit? See the link (below): https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/94uw4z Call Now - show contact info x 116 OR Text 116 to show contact info to contact our team. President Madison Apartments Community Info: Whether you choose a 1 & 2 bedroom floor plan, when you step inside your new home at President Madison near Troy, you'll be greeted by the warm embrace of comfort. A large, open-area living room with a picture window gives way to thoughtfully upgraded kitchen appliances, hardwood flooring, and a gas stove. Walk-in closets give you the room you need, and central AC and heat put you in control of your environment - no matter what the weather is like outside. Our modern community center, gated pool with lounge furniture, and fitness center are conveniently accessible and open when you need to relax, unwind or blow off steam. Located near the best of what Metro Detroit has to offer, President Madison has exactly what you're looking for in your new home. Features: ‣  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ‣  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ‣  Spacious closets ‣  Gas Range in all apartment homes ‣  Soft hued paint accented with white paneled doors ‣  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 800 to 856 square feet ‣  Large picture windows fitted with designer selected blinds ‣  Satin nickel hardware throughout residence ‣  Dishwashers available in select homes ‣  Secured entrance for each residence ‣  Resident Storage located on-site ‣  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ‣  Beautifully designed kitchen featuring oak cabinetry, GE white appliances and dark walnut* vinyl plank flooring ‣  Carports available ‣  Accent walls in living area of apartment home ‣  Common laundry room with full size GE wash and dryer Community Amenities: ‣  Beautifully designed outdoor swimming pool ‣  On-site resident storage area ‣  Expansive community center ‣  Beautiful, mature landscape ‣  BILT Payment Center ‣  Package Receiving ‣  Updater Application ‣  Professionally equipped exercise room with flat screen television ‣  FLEX Rental Payment ‣  Professional Onsite Management Team ‣  Pet-friendly community with a well-designed pet area, close to a city dog park ‣  Online Resident Portal ‣  Carports available ‣  Internet café with gourmet coffee bar Pet Policy: We are very happy to welcome your cats and small dogs as members of our community at President Madison. Just down the street you'll find wonderful dog parks and walking trails, or stay close to home and enjoy the lush landscape, mature trees, and tranquil open spaces. If you'd like to schedule a tour, be sure to bring your best friend along so they can explore President Madison with you. Office Hours: Monday-Friday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-6:00PM President Madison Apartments 31597 Harlo Drive, Madison Heights, MI, 48071 Equal Housing Opportunity 6KfbmIoq

Use this link for more details: https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/a85j3p APARTMENTS IN MADISON HEIGHTS Call Now - show contact info x 174 OR Text 174 to show contact info for more information.   Community Info NOW OPEN! BRAND NEW COMMUNITY CENTER featuring an expansive Social Gathering Room, fitness center with state-of-the art fitness equipment and flat screen televisions and a beautifully designed outdoor swimming pool. At Lexington Village Apartments you'll find so much more than a place to call home. It begins with a walk around our beautifully landscaped grounds. The brick-faced buildings and lush green grassy areas are the perfect place to relax with your favorite four-legged friend. In addition to being close to a dog park, Lexington Village Apartments is also one of the few communities with a pet friendly policy. Better still is our location. Within walking distance of the Oakland Mall and close to downtown Royal Oak, our residents are close to great shopping, dining options and entertainment, while still enjoying the serenity of our neighborhood. Easy access to I-75 and I-696 allow neighbors an easy way to get anywhere within the city. We encourage you to visit and see for yourself just how much Lexington Village Apartments has to offer, including our unique 24-hour service guarantee. Call to set up a private tour today! Residence Features ✩  Gas/heat, water, and trash included in flat monthly rate ✩  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ✩  Large picturesque windows fitted with designer selected blinds ✩  Gas range in all apartment homes ✩  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 625 to 850 square feet ✩  Individually-controlled air conditioning units ✩  On-site resident storage included ✩  Common laundry room in each building with full size washer and dryer ✩  Walk-in closets in select homes ✩  Spacious closets ✩  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ✩  Beautiful courtyard views available ✩  Dishwashers available in select homes ✩  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ✩  Heated hallways ✩  Indoor mailboxes Community Features ✩  Walking distance to AMC Theater and Oakland Mall ✩  Flex rental payments ✩  Online resident portal ✩  BILT payment center ✩  Beautiful, mature landscape ✩  Package receiving ✩  Professional onsite management team ✩  Expansive community clubhouse ✩  Pet friendly community with well-designed pet area and less than a mile away from city dog park ✩  Updater application ✩  Easy access to I-75 and I-696 ✩  State-of-the-art fitness center with flat screen televisions ✩  24-hour maintenance response guarantee ✩  Community laundry facility with industrial sized machines ✩  Controlled access and intercom system for building entry ✩  Covered parking ✩  On-site resident storage Pet Policy Lexington Village Apartments offers pet friendly apartments in Madison Heights and welcomes both cats and dogs. You'll find beautiful green spaces where your dog can run and play. In addition, your dog can run free and meet new friends at the nearby Red Oak Dog Park. We are one of the few communities in the area to welcome your large dog! We have a limit of 2 pets under 25 lbs each or one large pet without a weight limit. Some breed restrictions apply. We're confident your pet will love living at Lexington Village Apartments as much as our human neighbors do! Income Requirements Application Requirements: Verification of Employment/Monthly Income Resident needs approximately 2.5x rent in gross monthly income based on hours worked. Co-signor needs at least 5x rent in gross monthly income ? 1 Months' worth of most recent paycheck stubs ? Or offer letter on company letterhead, typed, with starting date, and monthly income ? Confirmation of Landlord/Rental History (we review the last 2 years) ? Credit Check and Criminal Background with YARDI screening ? craigslist.title: Individually-controlled air conditioning units, Covered parking
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Lexington Village Apartments 32000 Concord Drive, Madison Heights, MI, 48071 Use this link for more information: https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/t4ry96 Call Now - show contact info x 136 OR Text 136 to show contact info to text with us. APARTMENTS IN MADISON HEIGHTS 1 Bedroom, 1 Bath | Approximately 625 Sq. Ft. Community Info: Welcome home. Open floor plans and natural light is what you'll find when you choose a new home at Lexington Village. Whether you decide on a one- or two- bedroom concept, you'll be greeted by a spacious living room that seamlessly flows into an newly upgraded, contemporary kitchen. High-quality appliances, wood-like vinyl flooring, optional dishwasher, and stylish new cabinets are just a few of the amenities available to you. Spacious closets, individual AC and heat controls, on-site laundry and indoor mailboxes make your life convenient and comfortable, while shared community features that include a clubhouse, swimming pool and fitness center make living at Lexington Village an easy choice for your new home.   Unit Highlights ✧  Heated hallways ✧  Walk-in closets in select homes ✧  Large picturesque windows fitted with designer selected blinds ✧  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ✧  On-site resident storage included ✧  Dishwashers available in select homes ✧  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 625 to 850 square feet ✧  Individually-controlled air conditioning units ✧  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ✧  Gas/heat, water, and trash included in flat monthly rate ✧  Spacious closets ✧  Beautiful courtyard views available ✧  Indoor mailboxes ✧  Gas range in all apartment homes ✧  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ✧  Common laundry room in each building with full size washer and dryer Community Highlights ✧  24-hour maintenance response guarantee ✧  BILT payment center ✧  On-site resident storage ✧  Updater application ✧  Covered parking ✧  Beautiful, mature landscape ✧  Controlled access and intercom system for building entry ✧  Package receiving ✧  State-of-the-art fitness center with flat screen televisions ✧  Pet friendly community with well-designed pet area and less than a mile away from city dog park ✧  Professional onsite management team ✧  Walking distance to AMC Theater and Oakland Mall ✧  Online resident portal ✧  Community laundry facility with industrial sized machines ✧  Easy access to I-75 and I-696 ✧  Flex rental payments ✧  Expansive community clubhouse Office Hours Monday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Tuesday: 9:00AM-7:00PM Wednesday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Thursday: 9:00AM-7:00PM Friday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-6:00PM Sunday: 10:00AM-2:00PM Pet Policy Lexington Village Apartments offers pet friendly apartments in Madison Heights and welcomes both cats and dogs. You'll find beautiful green spaces where your dog can run and play. In addition, your dog can run free and meet new friends at the nearby Red Oak Dog Park. We are one of the few communities in the area to welcome your large dog! We have a limit of 2 pets under 25 lbs each or one large pet without a weight limit. Some breed restrictions apply. We're confident your pet will love living at Lexington Village Apartments as much as our human neighbors do! Equal Housing Opportunity 27s4QQPM

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post President Madison Apartments 31597 Harlo Drive, Madison Heights, MI, 48071 Interested in more information? Visit link below: https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/7wmzbf Call Now - show contact info x 114 OR Text 114 to show contact info to contact us. President Madison Apartments 1 Bedroom, 1 Bath | Approximately 820 Sq. Ft. Community Info: Whether you choose a 1 & 2 bedroom floor plan, when you step inside your new home at President Madison near Troy, you'll be greeted by the warm embrace of comfort. A large, open-area living room with a picture window gives way to thoughtfully upgraded kitchen appliances, hardwood flooring, and a gas stove. Walk-in closets give you the room you need, and central AC and heat put you in control of your environment - no matter what the weather is like outside. Our modern community center, gated pool with lounge furniture, and fitness center are conveniently accessible and open when you need to relax, unwind or blow off steam. Located near the best of what Metro Detroit has to offer, President Madison has exactly what you're looking for in your new home.   Unit Highlights ✧  Secured entrance for each residence ✧  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ✧  Large picture windows fitted with designer selected blinds ✧  Carports available ✧  Gas Range in all apartment homes ✧  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ✧  Common laundry room with full size GE wash and dryer ✧  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 800 to 856 square feet ✧  Resident Storage located on-site ✧  Beautifully designed kitchen featuring oak cabinetry, GE white appliances and dark walnut* vinyl plank flooring ✧  Satin nickel hardware throughout residence ✧  Dishwashers available in select homes ✧  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ✧  Soft hued paint accented with white paneled doors ✧  Accent walls in living area of apartment home ✧  Spacious closets Community Highlights ✧  Carports available ✧  BILT Payment Center ✧  FLEX Rental Payment ✧  Expansive community center ✧  Beautiful, mature landscape ✧  Online Resident Portal ✧  On-site resident storage area ✧  Professionally equipped exercise room with flat screen television ✧  Professional Onsite Management Team ✧  Pet-friendly community with a well-designed pet area, close to a city dog park ✧  Package Receiving ✧  Beautifully designed outdoor swimming pool ✧  Updater Application ✧  Internet café with gourmet coffee bar Driving Directions From I-75N: Exit at 12 Mile Rd. and turn right. Turn left at John R Rd. Pass 13 Mille and you will see Sam's Club on your right. Turn right at the first street after Sam's Club (Irving). Turn left at the next main street, Harlo. President Madison Apartments is in the apartment building 31597 with a blue and white sign in front. From I-75S: Exit at 14 Mile Rd. and turn left. Turn right at John R Rd. Turn left at Whitcomb (7-11 and target). Turn right at the next main street, Harlo. President Madison Apartments is in the apartment building 31597 with a blue and white sign in front. Office Hours Monday-Friday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-6:00PM Pet Policy We are very happy to welcome your cats and small dogs as members of our community at President Madison. Just down the street you'll find wonderful dog parks and walking trails, or stay close to home and enjoy the lush landscape, mature trees, and tranquil open spaces. If you'd like to schedule a tour, be sure to bring your best friend along so they can explore President Madison with you. Equal Housing Opportunity UdlpbA5T2l

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post This is a 2 Bedroom, 1 Bath, Approximately 800 Sq. Ft. Interested In This Unit? Use this link for more details: https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/ktkyzn Call Now - show contact info x 95 OR Text 95 to show contact info to text with us. APARTMENTS IN MADISON HEIGHTS Community Info: Welcome home. Open floor plans and natural light is what you'll find when you choose a new home at Lexington Village. Whether you decide on a one- or two- bedroom concept, you'll be greeted by a spacious living room that seamlessly flows into an newly upgraded, contemporary kitchen. High-quality appliances, wood-like vinyl flooring, optional dishwasher, and stylish new cabinets are just a few of the amenities available to you. Spacious closets, individual AC and heat controls, on-site laundry and indoor mailboxes make your life convenient and comfortable, while shared community features that include a clubhouse, swimming pool and fitness center make living at Lexington Village an easy choice for your new home. Features: ‣  Individually-controlled air conditioning units ‣  Dishwashers available in select homes ‣  Heated hallways ‣  Gas range in all apartment homes ‣  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ‣  Indoor mailboxes ‣  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 625 to 850 square feet ‣  Common laundry room in each building with full size washer and dryer ‣  On-site resident storage included ‣  Spacious closets ‣  Gas/heat, water, and trash included in flat monthly rate ‣  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ‣  Walk-in closets in select homes ‣  Beautiful courtyard views available ‣  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ‣  Large picturesque windows fitted with designer selected blinds Community Amenities: ‣  Expansive community clubhouse ‣  Pet friendly community with well-designed pet area and less than a mile away from city dog park ‣  On-site resident storage ‣  Updater application ‣  24-hour maintenance response guarantee ‣  Controlled access and intercom system for building entry ‣  Beautiful, mature landscape ‣  Community laundry facility with industrial sized machines ‣  Professional onsite management team ‣  Package receiving ‣  Walking distance to AMC Theater and Oakland Mall ‣  State-of-the-art fitness center with flat screen televisions ‣  Flex rental payments ‣  Covered parking ‣  Easy access to I-75 and I-696 ‣  Online resident portal ‣  BILT payment center Pet Policy: Lexington Village Apartments offers pet friendly apartments in Madison Heights and welcomes both cats and dogs. You'll find beautiful green spaces where your dog can run and play. In addition, your dog can run free and meet new friends at the nearby Red Oak Dog Park. We are one of the few communities in the area to welcome your large dog! We have a limit of 2 pets under 25 lbs each or one large pet without a weight limit. Some breed restrictions apply. We're confident your pet will love living at Lexington Village Apartments as much as our human neighbors do! Office Hours: Monday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Tuesday: 9:00AM-7:00PM Wednesday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Thursday: 9:00AM-7:00PM Friday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-6:00PM Sunday: 10:00AM-2:00PM Lexington Village Apartments 32000 Concord Drive, Madison Heights, MI, 48071 Equal Housing Opportunity x4Mzy4UQDMo

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Beds: 2 Baths: 1 Square Feet: 856 See our property details here: https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/16nsll President Madison Apartments Call Now - show contact info x 113 OR Text 113 to show contact info to text our team directly.   Community Info Whether you choose a 1 & 2 bedroom floor plan, when you step inside your new home at President Madison near Troy, you'll be greeted by the warm embrace of comfort. A large, open-area living room with a picture window gives way to thoughtfully upgraded kitchen appliances, hardwood flooring, and a gas stove. Walk-in closets give you the room you need, and central AC and heat put you in control of your environment - no matter what the weather is like outside. Our modern community center, gated pool with lounge furniture, and fitness center are conveniently accessible and open when you need to relax, unwind or blow off steam. Located near the best of what Metro Detroit has to offer, President Madison has exactly what you're looking for in your new home. Residence Features ✩  Gas Range in all apartment homes ✩  Beautifully designed kitchen featuring oak cabinetry, GE white appliances and dark walnut* vinyl plank flooring ✩  Dishwashers available in select homes ✩  Secured entrance for each residence ✩  Large picture windows fitted with designer selected blinds ✩  Carports available ✩  Spacious closets ✩  Accent walls in living area of apartment home ✩  Common laundry room with full size GE wash and dryer ✩  Soft hued paint accented with white paneled doors ✩  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ✩  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ✩  Satin nickel hardware throughout residence ✩  Resident Storage located on-site ✩  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 800 to 856 square feet ✩  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet Community Features ✩  BILT Payment Center ✩  FLEX Rental Payment ✩  Online Resident Portal ✩  Carports available ✩  Package Receiving ✩  Expansive community center ✩  Professional Onsite Management Team ✩  Beautifully designed outdoor swimming pool ✩  Pet-friendly community with a well-designed pet area, close to a city dog park ✩  On-site resident storage area ✩  Updater Application ✩  Beautiful, mature landscape ✩  Internet café with gourmet coffee bar ✩  Professionally equipped exercise room with flat screen television Pet Policy We are very happy to welcome your cats and small dogs as members of our community at President Madison. Just down the street you'll find wonderful dog parks and walking trails, or stay close to home and enjoy the lush landscape, mature trees, and tranquil open spaces. If you'd like to schedule a tour, be sure to bring your best friend along so they can explore President Madison with you. Driving Directions From I-75N: Exit at 12 Mile Rd. and turn right. Turn left at John R Rd. Pass 13 Mille and you will see Sam's Club on your right. Turn right at the first street after Sam's Club (Irving). Turn left at the next main street, Harlo. President Madison Apartments is in the apartment building 31597 with a blue and white sign in front. From I-75S: Exit at 14 Mile Rd. and turn left. Turn right at John R Rd. Turn left at Whitcomb (7-11 and target). Turn right at the next main street, Harlo. President Madison Apartments is in the apartment building 31597 with a blue and white sign in front. Office Hours Monday-Friday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-6:00PM Equal Housing Opportunity hIu7fU0hVYb

Residence Features ✩  Gas Range in all apartment homes ✩  Beautifully designed kitchen featuring oak cabinetry, GE white appliances and dark walnut* vinyl plank flooring ✩  Dishwashers available in select homes ✩  Secured entrance for each residence ✩  Large picture windows fitted with designer selected blinds ✩  Carports available ✩  Spacious closets ✩  Accent walls in living area of apartment home ✩  Common laundry room with full size GE wash and dryer ✩  Soft hued paint accented with white paneled doors ✩  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ✩  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ✩  Satin nickel hardware throughout residence ✩  Resident Storage located on-site ✩  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 800 to 856 square feet ✩  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet Community Features ✩  BILT Payment Center ✩  FLEX Rental Payment ✩  Online Resident Portal ✩  Carports available ✩  Package Receiving ✩  Expansive community center ✩  Professional Onsite Management Team ✩  Beautifully designed outdoor swimming pool ✩  Pet-friendly community with a well-designed pet area, close to a city dog park ✩  On-site resident storage area ✩  Updater Application ✩  Beautiful, mature landscape ✩  Internet café with gourmet coffee bar ✩  Professionally equipped exercise room with flat screen television Pet Policy We are very happy to welcome your cats and small dogs as members of our community at President Madison. Just down the street you'll find wonderful dog parks and walking trails, or stay close to home and enjoy the lush landscape, mature trees, and tranquil open spaces. If you'd like to schedule a tour, be sure to bring your best friend along so they can explore President Madison with you. Driving Directions From I-75N: Exit at 12 Mile Rd. and turn right. Turn left at John R Rd. Pass 13 Mille and you will see Sam's Club on your right. Turn right at the first street after Sam's Club (Irving). Turn left at the next main street, Harlo. President Madison Apartments is in the apartment building 31597 with a blue and white sign in front. From I-75S: Exit at 14 Mile Rd. and turn left. Turn right at John R Rd. Turn left at Whitcomb (7-11 and target). Turn right at the next main street, Harlo. President Madison Apartments is in the apartment building 31597 with a blue and white sign in front. craigslist.full_address: 00PM Harlo Apartments 31499 Mound Road, Warren, MI
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post This is a 2 Bedroom, 1 Bath, Approximately 1000 Sq. Ft. Follow This Link for More Information: https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/zj0xtc Call Now - show contact info x 251 OR Text 251 to show contact info to text us. Experience Harlo Apartments Community Info: Step inside our one- or two-bedroom open-concept floor plan apartments and experience the peace and tranquility of Harlo. You'll be greeted by large windows that let the natural sunlight in, and all the amenities of modern living; individually controlled AC and heat, plush carpet, generous closet space and an updated, ready-to-entertain kitchen, complete with oak cabinets and gas stove. If that weren't enough, your new home comes complete with beautiful views of a lush courtyard, access to a private swimming pool with an open sun deck and reclining lounge chairs, and updated fitness center with flat screen TV. Nestled in a beautiful neighborhood, Harlo Apartments in Macomb County has exactly what you're looking for in your new home. Features: ‣  Controlled access buildings ‣  Dishwasher available in select homes ‣  Spacious living room, dining room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ‣  Well-designed kitchen featuring maple cabinetry and gas stove ‣  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 800 to 1,000 square feet ‣  Large picture windows allow floods of natural sunlight ‣  Updated lighting fixtures throughout ‣  Red brick buildings and traditional architecture Community Amenities: ‣  Beautiful, lush grounds and courtyards with mature landscaping ‣  BILT payment center ‣  Near shopping, dining and entertainment venues ‣  Pet friendly community ‣  Flex rental payments ‣  On-site resident storage ‣  Online resident portal ‣  Updater application ‣  Common laundry room with full size washer and dryer ‣  Professionally-equipped exercise room with flat screen televisions ‣  Resort-style swimming pool with expansive sun deck ‣  Easy highway access ‣  Package receiving ‣  Open parking and carports ‣  Professional onsite management team Pet Policy: We are very happy to welcome your cats and small dogs as members of our community at Harlo Apartments. Just down the street you'll find wonderful dog parks and walking trails, or stay close to home and enjoy the lush landscape, mature trees and tranquil open spaces. If you'd like to schedule a tour, be sure to bring your best friend along so they can explore Harlo Apartments with you. Income Requirements: Recent 30 days of pay stubs to meet 2.5 times the rent Office Hours: Monday-Friday: 9:00AM-5:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-5:00PM Harlo Apartments 31499 Mound Road, Warren, MI, 48092 Equal Housing Opportunity HI5fewnobo0

President Madison Apartments Community Info: Whether you choose a 1 & 2 bedroom floor plan, when you step inside your new home at President Madison near Troy, you'll be greeted by the warm embrace of comfort. A large, open-area living room with a picture window gives way to thoughtfully upgraded kitchen appliances, hardwood flooring, and a gas stove. Walk-in closets give you the room you need, and central AC and heat put you in control of your environment - no matter what the weather is like outside. Our modern community center, gated pool with lounge furniture, and fitness center are conveniently accessible and open when you need to relax, unwind or blow off steam. Located near the best of what Metro Detroit has to offer, President Madison has exactly what you're looking for in your new home. Features: ‣  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 800 to 856 square feet ‣  Secured entrance for each residence ‣  Beautifully designed kitchen featuring oak cabinetry, GE white appliances and dark walnut* vinyl plank flooring ‣  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ‣  Soft hued paint accented with white paneled doors ‣  Common laundry room with full size GE wash and dryer ‣  Accent walls in living area of apartment home ‣  Satin nickel hardware throughout residence ‣  Resident Storage located on-site ‣  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ‣  Spacious closets ‣  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ‣  Dishwashers available in select homes ‣  Gas Range in all apartment homes ‣  Carports available ‣  Large picture windows fitted with designer selected blinds Community Amenities: ‣  Professionally equipped exercise room with flat screen television ‣  Online Resident Portal ‣  Package Receiving ‣  BILT Payment Center ‣  FLEX Rental Payment ‣  On-site resident storage area ‣  Beautiful, mature landscape ‣  Beautifully designed outdoor swimming pool ‣  Internet café with gourmet coffee bar ‣  Carports available ‣  Expansive community center ‣  Updater Application ‣  Professional Onsite Management Team ‣  Pet-friendly community with a well-designed pet area, close to a city dog park Pet Policy: We are very happy to welcome your cats and small dogs as members of our community at President Madison. Just down the street you'll find wonderful dog parks and walking trails, or stay close to home and enjoy the lush landscape, mature trees, and tranquil open spaces. If you'd like to schedule a tour, be sure to bring your best friend along so they can explore President Madison with you. Office Hours: Monday-Friday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-6:00PM President Madison Apartments 31597 Harlo Drive, Madison Heights, MI, 48071 Equal Housing Opportunity WMGgboDrfXK0

craigslist.title: Package receiving, Spacious closets
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Lexington Village Apartments 32000 Concord Drive, Madison Heights, MI, 48071 Call Now - show contact info x 173 OR Text 173 to show contact info to text our leasing team. Use the link below for more details: https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/80v88y APARTMENTS IN MADISON HEIGHTS 2 bedroom | 1 bath | 850 square feet Features ✓  Large picturesque windows fitted with designer selected blinds ✓  Common laundry room in each building with full size washer and dryer ✓  Heated hallways ✓  Gas/heat, water, and trash included in flat monthly rate ✓  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ✓  On-site resident storage included ✓  Gas range in all apartment homes ✓  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ✓  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 625 to 850 square feet ✓  Walk-in closets in select homes ✓  Indoor mailboxes ✓  Individually-controlled air conditioning units ✓  Spacious closets ✓  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ✓  Dishwashers available in select homes ✓  Beautiful courtyard views available Community Features ✓  State-of-the-art fitness center with flat screen televisions ✓  Covered parking ✓  Pet friendly community with well-designed pet area and less than a mile away from city dog park ✓  Package receiving ✓  Beautiful, mature landscape ✓  Online resident portal ✓  Easy access to I-75 and I-696 ✓  Controlled access and intercom system for building entry ✓  Expansive community clubhouse ✓  Professional onsite management team ✓  BILT payment center ✓  Updater application ✓  On-site resident storage ✓  24-hour maintenance response guarantee ✓  Flex rental payments ✓  Community laundry facility with industrial sized machines ✓  Walking distance to AMC Theater and Oakland Mall Community Info NOW OPEN! BRAND NEW COMMUNITY CENTER featuring an expansive Social Gathering Room, fitness center with state-of-the art fitness equipment and flat screen televisions and a beautifully designed outdoor swimming pool. At Lexington Village Apartments you'll find so much more than a place to call home. It begins with a walk around our beautifully landscaped grounds. The brick-faced buildings and lush green grassy areas are the perfect place to relax with your favorite four-legged friend. In addition to being close to a dog park, Lexington Village Apartments is also one of the few communities with a pet friendly policy. Better still is our location. Within walking distance of the Oakland Mall and close to downtown Royal Oak, our residents are close to great shopping, dining options and entertainment, while still enjoying the serenity of our neighborhood. Easy access to I-75 and I-696 allow neighbors an easy way to get anywhere within the city. We encourage you to visit and see for yourself just how much Lexington Village Apartments has to offer, including our unique 24-hour service guarantee. Call to set up a private tour today! Pet Policy Lexington Village Apartments offers pet friendly apartments in Madison Heights and welcomes both cats and dogs. You'll find beautiful green spaces where your dog can run and play. In addition, your dog can run free and meet new friends at the nearby Red Oak Dog Park. We are one of the few communities in the area to welcome your large dog! We have a limit of 2 pets under 25 lbs each or one large pet without a weight limit. Some breed restrictions apply. We're confident your pet will love living at Lexington Village Apartments as much as our human neighbors do! Income Requirements Application Requirements: Verification of Employment/Monthly Income Resident needs approximately 2.5x rent in gross monthly income based on hours worked. Co-signor needs at least 5x rent in gross monthly income ? 1 Months' worth of most recent paycheck stubs ? Or offer letter on company letterhead, typed, with starting date, and monthly income ? Confirmation of Landlord/Rental History (we review the last 2 years) ? Credit Check and Criminal Background with YARDI screening ? Application reviewed by management Office Hours Monday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Tuesday: 9:00AM-7:00PM Wednesday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Thursday: 9:00AM-7:00PM Friday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-6:00PM Sunday: 10:00AM-2:00PM Equal Housing Opportunity KSmaHEp43O

Experience Harlo Apartments 1 Bedroom, 1 Bath | Approximately 800 Sq. Ft. Community Info: Step inside our one- or two-bedroom open-concept floor plan apartments and experience the peace and tranquility of Harlo. You'll be greeted by large windows that let the natural sunlight in, and all the amenities of modern living; individually controlled AC and heat, plush carpet, generous closet space and an updated, ready-to-entertain kitchen, complete with oak cabinets and gas stove. If that weren't enough, your new home comes complete with beautiful views of a lush courtyard, access to a private swimming pool with an open sun deck and reclining lounge chairs, and updated fitness center with flat screen TV. Nestled in a beautiful neighborhood, Harlo Apartments in Macomb County has exactly what you're looking for in your new home.   Unit Highlights ✧  Updated lighting fixtures throughout ✧  Spacious living room, dining room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ✧  Large picture windows allow floods of natural sunlight ✧  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 800 to 1,000 square feet ✧  Red brick buildings and traditional architecture ✧  Well-designed kitchen featuring maple cabinetry and gas stove ✧  Controlled access buildings ✧  Dishwasher available in select homes Community Highlights ✧  Professional onsite management team ✧  Near shopping, dining and entertainment venues ✧  Resort-style swimming pool with expansive sun deck ✧  Updater application ✧  Pet friendly community ✧  Open parking and carports ✧  Common laundry room with full size washer and dryer ✧  On-site resident storage ✧  Professionally-equipped exercise room with flat screen televisions ✧  Easy highway access ✧  Flex rental payments ✧  Beautiful, lush grounds and courtyards with mature landscaping ✧  Online resident portal ✧  Package receiving ✧  BILT payment center Office Hours Monday-Friday: 9:00AM-5:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-5:00PM Pet Policy We are very happy to welcome your cats and small dogs as members of our community at Harlo Apartments. Just down the street you'll find wonderful dog parks and walking trails, or stay close to home and enjoy the lush landscape, mature trees and tranquil open spaces. If you'd like to schedule a tour, be sure to bring your best friend along so they can explore Harlo Apartments with you. Income Requirements Recent 30 days of pay stubs to meet 2.5 times the rent Equal Housing Opportunity Pq2jY0xj

Community Info Welcome home. Open floor plans and natural light is what you'll find when you choose a new home at Lexington Village. Whether you decide on a one- or two- bedroom concept, you'll be greeted by a spacious living room that seamlessly flows into an newly upgraded, contemporary kitchen. High-quality appliances, wood-like vinyl flooring, optional dishwasher, and stylish new cabinets are just a few of the amenities available to you. Spacious closets, individual AC and heat controls, on-site laundry and indoor mailboxes make your life convenient and comfortable, while shared community features that include a clubhouse, swimming pool and fitness center make living at Lexington Village an easy choice for your new home. Residence Features ✩  Large picturesque windows fitted with designer selected blinds ✩  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 625 to 850 square feet ✩  Common laundry room in each building with full size washer and dryer ✩  Indoor mailboxes ✩  Dishwashers available in select homes ✩  Spacious closets ✩  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ✩  Gas/heat, water, and trash included in flat monthly rate ✩  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ✩  Walk-in closets in select homes ✩  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ✩  Heated hallways ✩  On-site resident storage included ✩  Gas range in all apartment homes ✩  Individually-controlled air conditioning units ✩  Beautiful courtyard views available Community Features ✩  Beautiful, mature landscape ✩  Controlled access and intercom system for building entry ✩  Pet friendly community with well-designed pet area and less than a mile away from city dog park ✩  Expansive community clubhouse ✩  Professional onsite management team ✩  On-site resident storage ✩  Online resident portal ✩  Covered parking ✩  Community laundry facility with industrial sized machines ✩  24-hour maintenance response guarantee ✩  BILT payment center ✩  Walking distance to AMC Theater and Oakland Mall ✩  Flex rental payments ✩  State-of-the-art fitness center with flat screen televisions ✩  Easy access to I-75 and I-696 ✩  Package receiving ✩  Updater application Pet Policy Lexington Village Apartments offers pet friendly apartments in Madison Heights and welcomes both cats and dogs. You'll find beautiful green spaces where your dog can run and play. In addition, your dog can run free and meet new friends at the nearby Red Oak Dog Park. We are one of the few communities in the area to welcome your large dog! We have a limit of 2 pets under 25 lbs each or one large pet without a weight limit. Some breed restrictions apply. We're confident your pet will love living at Lexington Village Apartments as much as our human neighbors do! Walk-in closets give you the room you need, and central AC and heat put you in control of your environment - no matter what the weather is like outside. Our modern community center, gated pool with lounge furniture, and fitness center are conveniently accessible and open when you need to relax, unwind or blow off steam. Located near the best of what Metro Detroit has to offer, President Madison has exactly what you're looking for in your new home. craigslist.title: Online resident portal, Near shopping, dining and entertainment venues
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Harlo Apartments 31499 Mound Road, Warren, MI, 48092 Call Now - show contact info x 249 OR Text 249 to show contact info to contact us. Use the link below for more details: https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/fi10gk Experience Harlo Apartments 2 bedroom | 1 bath | 1000 square feet Features ✓  Updated lighting fixtures throughout ✓  Dishwasher available in select homes ✓  Controlled access buildings ✓  Spacious living room, dining room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ✓  Large picture windows allow floods of natural sunlight ✓  Red brick buildings and traditional architecture ✓  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 800 to 1,000 square feet ✓  Well-designed kitchen featuring maple cabinetry and gas stove Community Features ✓  Resort-style swimming pool with expansive sun deck ✓  Easy highway access ✓  Flex rental payments ✓  Beautiful, lush grounds and courtyards with mature landscaping ✓  On-site resident storage ✓  Common laundry room with full size washer and dryer ✓  Open parking and carports ✓  Package receiving ✓  Updater application ✓  Professionally-equipped exercise room with flat screen televisions ✓  BILT payment center ✓  Online resident portal ✓  Professional onsite management team ✓  Near shopping, dining and entertainment venues ✓  Pet friendly community Community Info Step inside our one- or two-bedroom open-concept floor plan apartments and experience the peace and tranquility of Harlo. You'll be greeted by large windows that let the natural sunlight in, and all the amenities of modern living; individually controlled AC and heat, plush carpet, generous closet space and an updated, ready-to-entertain kitchen, complete with oak cabinets and gas stove. If that weren't enough, your new home comes complete with beautiful views of a lush courtyard, access to a private swimming pool with an open sun deck and reclining lounge chairs, and updated fitness center with flat screen TV. Nestled in a beautiful neighborhood, Harlo Apartments in Macomb County has exactly what you're looking for in your new home. Pet Policy We are very happy to welcome your cats and small dogs as members of our community at Harlo Apartments. Just down the street you'll find wonderful dog parks and walking trails, or stay close to home and enjoy the lush landscape, mature trees and tranquil open spaces. If you'd like to schedule a tour, be sure to bring your best friend along so they can explore Harlo Apartments with you. Income Requirements Recent 30 days of pay stubs to meet 2.5 times the rent Office Hours Monday-Friday: 9:00AM-5:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-5:00PM Equal Housing Opportunity 0PaWENe7E0W

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Lexington Village Apartments 32000 Concord Drive, Madison Heights, MI, 48071 Use this link for more info: https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/cx59f0 Call Now - show contact info x 93 OR Text 93 to show contact info to contact us. APARTMENTS IN MADISON HEIGHTS 2 Bedroom, 1 Bath | Approximately 800 Sq. Ft. Community Info: Welcome home. Open floor plans and natural light is what you'll find when you choose a new home at Lexington Village. Whether you decide on a one- or two- bedroom concept, you'll be greeted by a spacious living room that seamlessly flows into an newly upgraded, contemporary kitchen. High-quality appliances, wood-like vinyl flooring, optional dishwasher, and stylish new cabinets are just a few of the amenities available to you. Spacious closets, individual AC and heat controls, on-site laundry and indoor mailboxes make your life convenient and comfortable, while shared community features that include a clubhouse, swimming pool and fitness center make living at Lexington Village an easy choice for your new home.   Unit Highlights ✧  Dishwashers available in select homes ✧  Large picturesque windows fitted with designer selected blinds ✧  Heated hallways ✧  Spacious closets ✧  Gas/heat, water, and trash included in flat monthly rate ✧  Walk-in closets in select homes ✧  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ✧  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ✧  Common laundry room in each building with full size washer and dryer ✧  Gas range in all apartment homes ✧  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ✧  Individually-controlled air conditioning units ✧  Indoor mailboxes ✧  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 625 to 850 square feet ✧  On-site resident storage included ✧  Beautiful courtyard views available Community Highlights ✧  Updater application ✧  BILT payment center ✧  Flex rental payments ✧  Walking distance to AMC Theater and Oakland Mall ✧  Online resident portal ✧  Easy access to I-75 and I-696 ✧  24-hour maintenance response guarantee ✧  Professional onsite management team ✧  Package receiving ✧  Covered parking ✧  Pet friendly community with well-designed pet area and less than a mile away from city dog park ✧  On-site resident storage ✧  Beautiful, mature landscape ✧  Community laundry facility with industrial sized machines ✧  Controlled access and intercom system for building entry ✧  Expansive community clubhouse ✧  State-of-the-art fitness center with flat screen televisions Office Hours Monday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Tuesday: 9:00AM-7:00PM Wednesday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Thursday: 9:00AM-7:00PM Friday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-6:00PM Sunday: 10:00AM-2:00PM Pet Policy Lexington Village Apartments offers pet friendly apartments in Madison Heights and welcomes both cats and dogs. You'll find beautiful green spaces where your dog can run and play. In addition, your dog can run free and meet new friends at the nearby Red Oak Dog Park. We are one of the few communities in the area to welcome your large dog! We have a limit of 2 pets under 25 lbs each or one large pet without a weight limit. Some breed restrictions apply. We're confident your pet will love living at Lexington Village Apartments as much as our human neighbors do! Equal Housing Opportunity WVzO8Gr9

craigslist.title: Updated lighting throughout the apartment home, Carports available
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post President Madison Apartments 31597 Harlo Drive, Madison Heights, MI, 48071 Want more information on this unit? See link (below): https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/n5es6g Call Now - show contact info x 110 OR Text 110 to show contact info to contact our leasing team. President Madison Apartments 1 Bedroom, 1 Bath | Approximately 820 Sq. Ft. Community Info: Whether you choose a 1 & 2 bedroom floor plan, when you step inside your new home at President Madison near Troy, you'll be greeted by the warm embrace of comfort. A large, open-area living room with a picture window gives way to thoughtfully upgraded kitchen appliances, hardwood flooring, and a gas stove. Walk-in closets give you the room you need, and central AC and heat put you in control of your environment - no matter what the weather is like outside. Our modern community center, gated pool with lounge furniture, and fitness center are conveniently accessible and open when you need to relax, unwind or blow off steam. Located near the best of what Metro Detroit has to offer, President Madison has exactly what you're looking for in your new home.   Unit Highlights ✧  Beautifully designed kitchen featuring oak cabinetry, GE white appliances and dark walnut* vinyl plank flooring ✧  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ✧  Soft hued paint accented with white paneled doors ✧  Spacious closets ✧  Satin nickel hardware throughout residence ✧  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ✧  Gas Range in all apartment homes ✧  Dishwashers available in select homes ✧  Resident Storage located on-site ✧  Carports available ✧  Common laundry room with full size GE wash and dryer ✧  Secured entrance for each residence ✧  Large picture windows fitted with designer selected blinds ✧  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 800 to 856 square feet ✧  Accent walls in living area of apartment home ✧  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home Community Highlights ✧  FLEX Rental Payment ✧  Beautifully designed outdoor swimming pool ✧  Package Receiving ✧  Expansive community center ✧  Internet café with gourmet coffee bar ✧  On-site resident storage area ✧  Beautiful, mature landscape ✧  Professionally equipped exercise room with flat screen television ✧  Online Resident Portal ✧  BILT Payment Center ✧  Pet-friendly community with a well-designed pet area, close to a city dog park ✧  Carports available ✧  Professional Onsite Management Team ✧  Updater Application Driving Directions From I-75N: Exit at 12 Mile Rd. and turn right. Turn left at John R Rd. Pass 13 Mille and you will see Sam's Club on your right. Turn right at the first street after Sam's Club (Irving). Turn left at the next main street, Harlo. President Madison Apartments is in the apartment building 31597 with a blue and white sign in front. From I-75S: Exit at 14 Mile Rd. and turn left. Turn right at John R Rd. Turn left at Whitcomb (7-11 and target). Turn right at the next main street, Harlo. President Madison Apartments is in the apartment building 31597 with a blue and white sign in front. Office Hours Monday-Friday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-6:00PM Pet Policy We are very happy to welcome your cats and small dogs as members of our community at President Madison. Just down the street you'll find wonderful dog parks and walking trails, or stay close to home and enjoy the lush landscape, mature trees, and tranquil open spaces. If you'd like to schedule a tour, be sure to bring your best friend along so they can explore President Madison with you. Equal Housing Opportunity KSjbbJ51U86

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Fully Furnished Turn Key Condo located in Harrison Township! This condo is located just a few miles between I-94 expressway and beautiful Metro Beach, along a beautiful residential community. It is a 2 bedroom 1 bath upper unit condo with cathedral ceilings and a balcony off the bedroom. Very tastefully decorated and painted throughout. Updated kitchen with granite countertops. Washer and dryer, central AC, dishwasher and fully stocked kitchenware. Very well kept and clean with high end furniture. Convenient parking with a covered carport steps away from private entrance.

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Beds: 1 Baths: 1 Square Feet: 800 Want more info? See the link below: https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/1jc1r2 Experience Harlo Apartments Call Now - show contact info x 248 OR Text 248 to show contact info to contact our team.   Community Info Step inside our one- or two-bedroom open-concept floor plan apartments and experience the peace and tranquility of Harlo. You'll be greeted by large windows that let the natural sunlight in, and all the amenities of modern living; individually controlled AC and heat, plush carpet, generous closet space and an updated, ready-to-entertain kitchen, complete with oak cabinets and gas stove. If that weren't enough, your new home comes complete with beautiful views of a lush courtyard, access to a private swimming pool with an open sun deck and reclining lounge chairs, and updated fitness center with flat screen TV. Nestled in a beautiful neighborhood, Harlo Apartments in Macomb County has exactly what you're looking for in your new home. Residence Features ✩  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 800 to 1,000 square feet ✩  Red brick buildings and traditional architecture ✩  Well-designed kitchen featuring maple cabinetry and gas stove ✩  Spacious living room, dining room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ✩  Large picture windows allow floods of natural sunlight ✩  Controlled access buildings ✩  Updated lighting fixtures throughout ✩  Dishwasher available in select homes Community Features ✩  Package receiving ✩  On-site resident storage ✩  Pet friendly community ✩  Flex rental payments ✩  Beautiful, lush grounds and courtyards with mature landscaping ✩  BILT payment center ✩  Near shopping, dining and entertainment venues ✩  Easy highway access ✩  Open parking and carports ✩  Professional onsite management team ✩  Resort-style swimming pool with expansive sun deck ✩  Common laundry room with full size washer and dryer ✩  Professionally-equipped exercise room with flat screen televisions ✩  Updater application ✩  Online resident portal Pet Policy We are very happy to welcome your cats and small dogs as members of our community at Harlo Apartments. Just down the street you'll find wonderful dog parks and walking trails, or stay close to home and enjoy the lush landscape, mature trees and tranquil open spaces. If you'd like to schedule a tour, be sure to bring your best friend along so they can explore Harlo Apartments with you. Income Requirements Recent 30 days of pay stubs to meet 2.5 times the rent Office Hours Monday-Friday: 9:00AM-5:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-5:00PM Equal Housing Opportunity YlJKgeBlt2

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post This is a 2 Bedroom, 1 Bath, Approximately 850 Sq. Ft. Use this link for more information: https://wwwbeztakcom.gotoapt.com/8y5136 Call Now - show contact info x 92 OR Text 92 to show contact info to text our team. APARTMENTS IN MADISON HEIGHTS Community Info: NOW OPEN! BRAND NEW COMMUNITY CENTER featuring an expansive Social Gathering Room, fitness center with state-of-the art fitness equipment and flat screen televisions and a beautifully designed outdoor swimming pool. At Lexington Village Apartments you'll find so much more than a place to call home. It begins with a walk around our beautifully landscaped grounds. The brick-faced buildings and lush green grassy areas are the perfect place to relax with your favorite four-legged friend. In addition to being close to a dog park, Lexington Village Apartments is also one of the few communities with a pet friendly policy. Better still is our location. Within walking distance of the Oakland Mall and close to downtown Royal Oak, our residents are close to great shopping, dining options and entertainment, while still enjoying the serenity of our neighborhood. Easy access to I-75 and I-696 allow neighbors an easy way to get anywhere within the city. We encourage you to visit and see for yourself just how much Lexington Village Apartments has to offer, including our unique 24-hour service guarantee. Call to set up a private tour today! Features: ‣  Well-designed floor plans ranging from 625 to 850 square feet ‣  On-site resident storage included ‣  Spacious closets ‣  Brick buildings and traditional architecture ‣  Beautiful courtyard views available ‣  Updated lighting throughout the apartment home ‣  Walk-in closets in select homes ‣  Individually-controlled air conditioning units ‣  Heated hallways ‣  Spacious living room and bedrooms featuring plush neutral carpet ‣  Dishwashers available in select homes ‣  Large picturesque windows fitted with designer selected blinds ‣  Gas/heat, water, and trash included in flat monthly rate ‣  Indoor mailboxes ‣  Gas range in all apartment homes ‣  Common laundry room in each building with full size washer and dryer Community Amenities: ‣  Controlled access and intercom system for building entry ‣  Flex rental payments ‣  Beautiful, mature landscape ‣  Updater application ‣  Package receiving ‣  24-hour maintenance response guarantee ‣  Community laundry facility with industrial sized machines ‣  State-of-the-art fitness center with flat screen televisions ‣  Walking distance to AMC Theater and Oakland Mall ‣  Online resident portal ‣  On-site resident storage ‣  Expansive community clubhouse ‣  Easy access to I-75 and I-696 ‣  BILT payment center ‣  Professional onsite management team ‣  Covered parking ‣  Pet friendly community with well-designed pet area and less than a mile away from city dog park Pet Policy: Lexington Village Apartments offers pet friendly apartments in Madison Heights and welcomes both cats and dogs. You'll find beautiful green spaces where your dog can run and play. In addition, your dog can run free and meet new friends at the nearby Red Oak Dog Park. We are one of the few communities in the area to welcome your large dog! We have a limit of 2 pets under 25 lbs each or one large pet without a weight limit. Some breed restrictions apply. We're confident your pet will love living at Lexington Village Apartments as much as our human neighbors do! Income Requirements: Application Requirements: Verification of Employment/Monthly Income Resident needs approximately 2.5x rent in gross monthly income based on hours worked. Co-signor needs at least 5x rent in gross monthly income ? 1 Months' worth of most recent paycheck stubs ? Or offer letter on company letterhead, typed, with starting date, and monthly income ? Confirmation of Landlord/Rental History (we review the last 2 years) ? Credit Check and Criminal Background with YARDI screening ? Application reviewed by management Office Hours: Monday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Tuesday: 9:00AM-7:00PM Wednesday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Thursday: 9:00AM-7:00PM Friday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-6:00PM Sunday: 10:00AM-2:00PM Lexington Village Apartments 32000 Concord Drive, Madison Heights, MI, 48071 Equal Housing Opportunity xpfHQ06DG

Contact the Landlord : https://rental.turbotenant.com/p/4411-devonshire-rd-detroit-mi/2de4d356-59ac-4560-a305-c930a5c17681?source=craigslist Property Description: Minimum credit score of 650 required to apply. Welcome home to this beautifully remodeled 3-bedroom, 2-bath brick Colonial just minutes from East English Village! Nestled on a quiet, tree-lined street, this home offers the perfect blend of classic charm and modern updates. Step inside to find beautiful hardwood floors, abundant natural light, fresh paint, and updated lighting throughout. The stylish kitchen features granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, and modern cabinetry, making it a great space for both everyday living and entertaining. The finished basement adds valuable living space and includes an additional bathroom, making it ideal for a family room, home office, gym, or media room. Outside, you'll enjoy a private, fenced backyard that's perfect for relaxing, entertaining, or letting pets play. A detached garage provides added convenience, especially during Michigan winters. Rental Requirements: - Household income must be at least 3.5 times the monthly rent. - All adult applicants must have a minimum credit score of 650. Don't miss the opportunity to make this move-in-ready home yours—schedule your showing today! Welcome home to this beautifully remodeled 3-bedroom, 2-bath brick Colonial just minutes from East English Village! Nestled on a quiet, tree-lined street, this home offers the perfect blend of classic charm and modern updates. Step inside to find beautiful hardwood floors, abundant natural light, fresh paint, and updated lighting throughout. The stylish kitchen features granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, and modern cabinetry, making it a great space for both everyday living and entertaining. The finished basement adds valuable living space and includes an additional bathroom, making it ideal for a family room, home office, gym, or media room. Outside, you'll enjoy a private, fenced backyard that's perfect for relaxing, entertaining, or letting pets play. A detached garage provides added convenience, especially during Michigan winters. Rental Requirements: - Household income must be at least 3.5 times the monthly rent. - All adult applicants must have a minimum credit score of 650. Don't miss the opportunity to make this move-in-ready home yours—schedule your showing today! craigslist.title: “Summer Fun Starts Here”
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 3 bedroom 1 bathroom apartment in Nardin Park available for rent. Place is brand new (I was the first resident and moved in September 2025) and rent is $700 a month. Place comes with in unit laundry, a storage room in the basement and access to free internet. Rent is thru January 2026 and can be renewed for 12 months afterwards. Let me know if you have any questions and or want to schedule a tour. Note apartment is part of Michigan Neighborhood affordable housing program and thus has requirements to qualify for rent. To qualify you must have a minimum credit rating at 500 and generate max $86k annual income. Note: I’ll provide $800 cash to anyone who applies for the unit and gets approved. That means the unit will essentially cost $1,040 a month. For a brand new two bedroom unit that is a STEAL. You will not find a better deal in the market flat out. No bull shit no games.
